alignments.name: Chaotic Evil
alignments.description: A chaotic evil character does whatever his heart desires.

alignments.name: Chaotic Neutral
alignments.description: A chaotic neutral character follows his whims.

alignments.name: Chaotic Good
alignments.description: A chaotic good character acts as his conscience directs him with little regard for what others expect of him.

alignments.name: Neutral Evil
alignments.description: A neutral evil villain does whatever she can get away with.

alignments.name: True Neutral
alignments.description: A true neutral character does what seems to be a good idea.

alignments.name: Neutral Good
alignments.description: A neutral good character does the best that a good person can do.

alignments.name: Lawful Evil
alignments.description: A lawful evil villain methodically takes what she wants within the limits of her code of conduct.

alignments.name: Lawful Neutral
alignments.description: A lawful neutral character acts as law, tradition, or a personal code directs her.

alignments.name: Lawful Good
alignments.description: A lawful good character combines a commitment to oppose evil with the discipline to fight relentlessly.
